name: Tow Cable
official_rules_text: After a Vehicle suffers 1 or more Wounds from an attack that has Tow Cable in the Attack Pool, the attacking player makes a Pivot with that Vehicle, then it gains 1 Immobilize token.
description: After a Vehicle suffers 1 or more Wounds from an attack that has Tow Cable in the Attack Pool, the attacking player makes a Pivot with that Vehicle, then it gains 1 Immobilize token.
